payload.answer: Rejected: normal users cannot execute admin SQL commands, and no memory was created or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command from a normal user, not a durable personal memory fact.

details: Detected attempted admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;

repair_options: If you intended to manage your own memories, use supported user-level memory commands.
If you need administrative database access, authenticate through an authorized admin interface.
